composer.role_mention_confirm_body: This message contains a mention that may notify multiple people.
composer.drop_files_subtitle: Files will be added to your message
composer.queued_offline: Message saved securely. It will be sent when the connection returns.
composer.attachments_need_connection: Keep this draft open: attachments need a connection before they can be queued.

voice.connection_required: Keep this voice message open: a connection is required before it can be queued.
voice.unsupported: Voice recording is not supported by this browser.
voice.microphone_denied: Microphone access was denied. Allow it in your browser settings and try again.
voice.microphone_not_found: No microphone was found on this device.
voice.microphone_in_use: The microphone is already in use by another application.
voice.recording_failed: The voice message could not be recorded. Please try again.
voice.playback_failed: This voice message could not be played. Please try again.
voice.too_short: That recording was too short. Hold on for a moment before stopping it.
voice.too_large: This voice message is too large to send. Record a shorter message.
